# Introduction

This repository is a Quarto thesis template for Istanbul Technical University
(ITU). It uses ITU's official LaTeX thesis class and maps Quarto metadata to the
class commands that generate the cover pages, approval page, frontmatter, lists,
abstracts, and page numbering.

The first chapter should introduce the research question, motivation, scope, and
main contributions. Add citations with standard Quarto citation syntax, such as
@apa2020.

## Thesis Objective

State the objective of the thesis here. Keep source files in Markdown or Quarto
Markdown, and use LaTeX only for the parts that must be controlled by the official
ITU class.

## Contributions

Summarize the contributions as a short list.

- A reproducible thesis-writing workflow based on Quarto.
- An ITU-compliant PDF layout provided by the official LaTeX class.
- A metadata bridge that keeps thesis identity fields in `_quarto.yml`.
